title: Cactus Mining Damage
description: Makes cacti damage you when mined with a fist
body: # | DESCRIPTION | Makes you take 1/2 heart of damage every time you mine a cactus with your first, because it has thorns. Mining it with an item in your hand (or using the cactus item to mine or attack things) won't do damage. # | VERSIONS | Currently supports Minecraft Java ```1.21-1.21.11```. # | COMPATIBILITY | Incompatiple with datapacks using the same function or scoreboard name. ## | Patreon | Join my new Patreon to support my projects!
